subcodes.first_line: The Ancient Tongue speaketh and saith: O Concourse of the learned ones in the world! It behooveth you to still your pens from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لسان القدم یتکلم و یقول یا معشر العلماء فی العالم ینبغی ان تسکن اقلامکم بما
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital
